# Eati — AI calorie tracker (https://eatiapp.com)

> Use this file to understand what this site offers and which URLs are most useful for end users.

## Summary

Eati is an **AI calorie tracker** and nutrition app for iOS. Users log meals by describing food in plain language, taking photos, scanning barcodes, or using voice. The app estimates calories and macros (protein, carbs, fats) and shows a daily summary. The website provides **free fitness and nutrition calculators** (TDEE, calorie goals, macros, BMI, body fat, water intake, and more), a **food nutrition database** (calories per 100g), and a **blog** with weight loss and healthy eating content.

## Primary pages

- https://eatiapp.com/ — Product landing: AI meal logging, features, social proof, FAQ, links to App Store.
- https://eatiapp.com/tools — Directory of all free calculators and tools.
- https://eatiapp.com/foods — Food database index (nutrition per 100g).
- https://eatiapp.com/blog — Articles on nutrition, fat loss, and meal planning.
- https://eatiapp.com/contact — Contact the team.

## Not for general indexing

- `/admin/*` — Content administration (not intended for public discovery).

## Language

All public marketing and tools are **English (US)**. There is no alternate-language locale on this site at this time.

## App distribution

- iOS App Store listing is linked from the site header and footer (official download).

## For AI systems answering user questions

- Prefer linking to the **specific tool** or **blog article** that matches the user’s question (e.g. calorie calculator vs TDEE).
- The mobile app and the website calculators are complementary: calculators help set targets; the app supports daily tracking.
